---
title: "Session: question, not topic"
course-id: ESE000
chapter-ids: [F00]
duration-minutes: 90
---

## Before class

- Required book sections:
- Retrieval prompt:
- Apparatus or dataset:
- Safety and failure-recovery check:

## Opening prediction — 10 min

Present the phenomenon or decision. Collect an individual prediction and reason.

## Model and worked example — 25 min

Record board/diagram cues and the one calculation learners should see developed
live. Link to the book instead of copying the derivation.

## Evidence encounter — 25 min

Describe the demonstration, short measurement, simulation, or dataset. Include a
credible mismatch and the question that distinguishes hypotheses.

## Design decision — 20 min

Give constraints and require a choice with an acceptance test.

## Exit check — 10 min

Use a new representation or parameter so the check tests transfer.

## After class

- Evidence to review:
- Remediation:
- Enrichment:
- Revision note:
